author: Eunjae Lee
subject: chore(examples): implement e-commerce demo mobile design (algolia/vue-instantsearch#687)
body:
* chore(examples): update latest css from InstantSearch.js e-commerce demo

* chore(examples): add mobile design for e-commerce demo

* chore(examples): move category to the top

* chore(examples): update style to avoid collision between filter footer and vue-slider

* Update examples/ecommerce/src/App.vue

Co-Authored-By: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore(examples): store container-results once and reuse it later

* chore(examples): update dom output

* chore(examples): update svg of rating star icon

* chore(examples): increase the size of slider handle

* chore(examples): fix 'reset filters' button

* chore(examples): move querying part to mounted lifecycle

* chore(examples): format numbers

* chore(examples): format number of toolip on slider

* chore(examples): add comments in theme

* chore(examples): increase padding for submit and reset SearchBox buttons

* chore(examples): fix pagination padding

* chore(examples): close panel on outter click

* chore(examples): make searchbox more accessible on mobile

* chore(examples): shorten search box placeholder

* chore(examples): fix filters buttons on mobile

* chore(examples): fix refinement list display on mobile

* chore(examples): override default size of reset button in SearchBox

* chore(examples): show reset button in header SearchBox

* chore(examples): update position of submit icon

* chore(examples): update height of slider rail

* chore(examples): update style

* chore(examples): close panel on outter click on mobile safari

* chore(examples): add comment

* chore(examples): clean up styles

* chore(examples): increase handle size of slider on mobile
